creator: svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru
text:
Submitter, maintainer and myself all are one and the same person.
As was stated in the Class section of the original PR:

>Class:         maintainer-update

before somebody/something has changed this Class section.

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Workflow,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/131070 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131070
>
